title: What had happened to the writer's bag?

meanings.usage: 指提供酒精饮料的公共场所，英国常用
指出租房屋或经营店铺的人
指装东西的容器，此处指手提包
指种植花草蔬菜的地方
指 breakfast, lunch, dinner 等
指需要支付的费用的清单
指回到原地或把东西还回去
指移动或携带某物到别处

phrases.usage: 寻找，表示搜索或查找的动作过程

examples.en: I looked for my bag everywhere.
We had lunch at a village pub.
examples.zh: 我们在乡村酒吧吃了午餐。

phrases.usage: 进来，指从外面进入室内

examples.en: The landlord came in at that moment.
The landlord smiled and immediately went out.
examples.zh: 店主笑了笑马上出去了。

phrases.usage: 归还，指把东西还给原主

examples.en: He returned with my bag and gave it back to me.
examples.zh: 他拿着我的包回来并还给了我。

phrases.usage: 几分钟后，表示很短的时间之后

examples.en: In a few minutes he returned with my bag.
examples.zh: 几分钟后他拿着我的包回来了。

phrases.usage: 付账，支付用餐或服务的费用

examples.en: I can't pay the bill. I haven't got my bag.

phrases.usage: 吃得好，享用了一顿美餐

examples.en: Did you have a good meal?

phrases.usage: 带进，把某物或某人带到某处

examples.en: My dog had taken it into the garden.
examples.zh: 我的狗把它叼到花园里去了。

phrases.usage: 放在...上（未带走），指将东西留在某处

examples.en: I had left it on a chair beside the door.
examples.zh: 我把它留在门边的椅子上了。

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻之前已经完成的动作或状态，即"过去的过去"
grammar.usage: 用于描述两个过去的动作，先发生的动作用过去完成时，后发生的动作用一般过去时。常与 after, before, when, as soon as 等连用，或通过上下文体现时间先后

examples.en: After I had had lunch, I looked for my bag.
examples.zh: 我吃完午饭后，开始找我的包。

examples.en: I had left it on a chair and now it wasn't there.
examples.zh: 我把它留在椅子上，现在却不见了。

examples.en: He said his dog had taken it into the garden.
examples.zh: 他说他的狗把它叼到花园里去了。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻或时间段正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述正在进行的动作，常与 when, while, as 等连用。when 引导的短句可放在句首或句末

examples.en: As I was looking for it, the landlord came in.
examples.zh: 当我正在找包的时候，店主进来了。

examples.en: While I was having lunch, someone took my bag.
examples.zh: 我吃午饭时有人拿走了我的包。

sentencePatterns.pattern: After + 主语 + had + 过去分词, 主语 + 动词过去式

original.en: After I had had lunch at a village pub, I looked for my bag.
original.zh: 我在乡村酒吧吃完午饭后，开始找我的包。

imitations.en: After I had finished my work, I went home.
After she had called me, she left.
imitations.zh: 她给我打完电话后就离开了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: As + 主语 + was/were + 动词-ing, 主语 + 动词过去式

original.en: As I was looking for it, the landlord came in.
original.zh: 当我正在找包的时候，店主进来了。

imitations.en: As I was walking home, it started to rain.
imitations.zh: 我走路回家时，开始下雨了。

imitations.en: As he was cooking, the phone rang.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + had + 过去分词 + and + now + 主语 + 动词过去式/否定

original.en: I had left it on a chair beside the door and now it wasn't there!
original.zh: 我把它留在门边的椅子上，现在却不见了！

imitations.en: I had put the keys on the table and now they are missing.
imitations.zh: 我把钥匙放在桌上了，现在不见了。

imitations.en: She had parked her car here and now it's gone.
imitations.zh: 她把车停在这里，现在不见了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: In + 一段时间 + 主语 + 动词过去式 + with + 某物

original.en: In a few minutes he returned with my bag.
original.zh: 几分钟后他拿着我的包回来了。

imitations.en: In ten minutes she came back with some flowers.
imitations.zh: 十分钟后她拿着一些花回来了。

imitations.en: In an hour he arrived with good news.
imitations.zh: 一小时后他带着好消息来了。
